recipes.title: Creamy Tuscan Garlic Chicken
recipes.description: Tender pan-fried chicken breasts in a rich, creamy parmesan sauce with sun-dried tomatoes and spinach. A restaurant-quality meal ready in just 30 minutes.
ingredients: 2 large chicken breasts, sliced in half horizontally
steps: In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until golden brown (about 5 minutes per side). Remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the heavy cream, chicken broth, garlic powder, italian seasoning, and parmesan cheese. Whisk over medium heat until it starts to thicken.
Add the spinach and sun-dried tomatoes to the skillet. Simmer until the spinach is wilted.
Return the chicken to the skillet and coat with the sauce. Serve immediately over pasta or with crusty bread.

recipes.title: Spicy Salmon Sushi Bowls
recipes.description: All the flavors of a spicy salmon roll in an easy-to-assemble bowl. Fresh, healthy, and incredibly satisfying.
steps: In a bowl, toss the cubed salmon with soy sauce and sesame oil. Let sit for 5 minutes.
Divide the cooked sushi rice into two bowls.
Top the rice with the marinated salmon, sliced avocado, and diced cucumber.
Drizzle heavily with spicy mayo, sprinkle with sesame seeds, and serve with nori sheets.

recipes.title: Classic Beef Wellington
recipes.description: A show-stopping centerpiece featuring perfectly seared beef tenderloin wrapped in a mushroom duxelles, prosciutto, and golden puff pastry.
steps: Season the beef generously. Sear in a hot pan on all sides until browned. Let cool, then brush with mustard.
Cook the mushrooms in a dry pan until all moisture evaporates. Let cool.
Lay out plastic wrap. Overlap prosciutto slices, spread mushrooms over them, and place beef in the center. Roll tightly and chill for 30 minutes.
Wrap the chilled beef roll in puff pastry. Brush with egg wash and score the top.
Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 25-35 minutes until pastry is golden and meat reaches desired doneness. Rest before slicing.

recipes.title: Fluffy Japanese Pancakes
recipes.description: Cloud-like, jiggly soufflé pancakes that melt in your mouth. Serve with fresh berries and maple syrup.
steps: Whisk egg yolks, milk, and vanilla. Sift in flour and baking powder, whisk until smooth.
In a separate clean bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold the egg whites into the yolk mixture in three additions. Do not overmix.
Heat a non-stick pan over very low heat. Scoop tall mounds of batter. Cover with a lid and cook for 4-5 minutes per side until golden.
Serve immediately with butter and syrup.

recipes.title: Butter Chicken
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Butter Chicken, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
steps: Prepare all ingredients by washing, peeling, and chopping as necessary.
Heat oil or butter in a pan over medium heat. Sauté the onions and garlic until fragrant.
Add the main ingredient and cook until browned on all sides.
Stir in the spices and season generously with salt and pepper.
Add a splash of water or broth, cover, and simmer until fully cooked.
Plate beautifully, garnish with fresh herbs, and serve hot.

recipes.title: Chicken Biryani
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Chicken Biryani, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 2 cups Basmati rice, washed and soaked
steps: Marinate the 1 lb chicken with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, and spices for 1 hour.
In a large pot, heat ghee and fry the whole spices and sliced onions until golden brown.
Add the marinated mixture and cook until the oil begins to separate.
In a separate pot, boil water with salt and whole spices, then parboil the soaked basmati rice (about 70% cooked).
Layer the parboiled rice over the cooked mixture. Sprinkle mint leaves and saffron milk.
Cover tightly and cook on low heat (dum) for 20-25 minutes. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Chicken Curry
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Chicken Curry, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
steps: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until golden brown.
Add ginger-garlic paste and sauté for another 2 minutes until fragrant.
Pour in the tomato puree, turmeric, red chili powder, and salt. Cook until the mixture thickens and oil separates.
Add the 1 lb chicken and coat well with the masala.
Add half a cup of water, cover, and simmer until cooked through (about 15-20 minutes).
Sprinkle garam masala and garnish with fresh coriander before serving.

recipes.title: Chicken Alfredo Pasta
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Chicken Alfredo Pasta, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
steps: Boil fettuccine pasta in salted water until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt a tablespoon of butter and cook the chicken until golden and cooked through. Remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, melt the remaining butter. Add minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Whisk in the heavy cream and let it simmer for 2 minutes.
Gradually whisk in the parmesan cheese until the sauce is smooth and creamy.
Season with salt and pepper. Add the cooked pasta and chicken back into the skillet and toss to coat.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.

Place a cheese slice on top of the hot patty so it melts slightly.
Close the burger/sandwich and serve immediately with a side of fries.

steps: Prepare your pasta by boiling it in salted water, or roll out your pizza dough on a floured surface.

Bake or simmer until the cheese is melted, bubbly, and slightly golden.

recipes.title: Paneer Butter Masala

steps: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until golden brown.

Add the 250g paneer and coat well with the masala.
Add half a cup of water, cover, and simmer until cooked through (about 15-20 minutes).
Sprinkle garam masala and garnish with fresh coriander before serving.

recipes.title: Veg Biryani
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Veg Biryani, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 2 cups Basmati rice, washed and soaked
steps: Marinate the mixed vegetables with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, and spices for 1 hour.
In a large pot, heat ghee and fry the whole spices and sliced onions until golden brown.
Add the marinated mixture and cook until the oil begins to separate.
In a separate pot, boil water with salt and whole spices, then parboil the soaked basmati rice (about 70% cooked).
Layer the parboiled rice over the cooked mixture. Sprinkle mint leaves and saffron milk.
Cover tightly and cook on low heat (dum) for 20-25 minutes. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Veg Hakka Noodles
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Veg Hakka Noodles, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 1 cup Mixed julienned vegetables (cabbage, carrot, bell pepper)
1 tbsp Chili sauce or Schezwan sauce
steps: Boil noodles according to package instructions. Drain, toss with a little oil, and set aside.
Heat oil in a wok or large pan over high heat. Add garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the julienned vegetables and stir-fry vigorously for 2-3 minutes so they remain crunchy.
Add the sauces, vinegar, and a pinch of salt. Mix well.
Toss the boiled noodles into the wok and mix thoroughly until coated with the sauces.
Garnish with chopped spring onions and serve hot.

recipes.title: White Sauce Pasta
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of White Sauce Pasta, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
steps: Prepare your pasta by boiling it in salted water, or roll out your pizza dough on a floured surface.
In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté minced garlic until fragrant.
Add your protein (if using) and cook thoroughly. Then pour in the tomato sauce and simmer for 10 minutes.
Combine the sauce with the cooked pasta, or spread it evenly over the pizza dough.
Top generously with mozzarella and parmesan cheese.
Bake or simmer until the cheese is melted, bubbly, and slightly golden.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Tomato Soup
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Tomato Soup, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 2 cups chopped mixed vegetables (potato, corn, peas)
steps: Heat olive oil in a large soup pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions, garlic, carrots, and celery. Sauté for 5-7 minutes until softened.
Add the main ingredient and pour in the broth.
Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce the heat, cover, and simmer for 25-30 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper. For a smoother texture, blend a portion of the soup.
Serve hot with crusty bread.

recipes.title: Kheer
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Kheer, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 1 tsp Vanilla extract or Cardamom powder
steps: In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, bring the milk to a gentle boil.
Add your base ingredient (like soaked rice or pre-mixed custard powder slurry).
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, stirring continuously to prevent sticking.
Once the mixture thickens to the desired consistency, stir in the sugar and flavor extracts.
Continue to cook for another 5 minutes until the sugar is fully dissolved.
Remove from heat, garnish with chopped nuts, and chill in the refrigerator before serving.

recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Ice Cream, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 1/4 cup Cornstarch or Custard powder (if making custard)
1 tsp Vanilla extract or Cardamom powder
steps: In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, bring the milk to a gentle boil.
Add your base ingredient (like soaked rice or pre-mixed custard powder slurry).

recipes.title: Brownies
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Brownies, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
steps: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C) and grease a baking pan.
In a large bowl, cream together the softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, alternating with milk.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 30-35 minutes until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow to cool completely before slicing or frosting.

recipes.title: Chocolate Cake
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Chocolate Cake, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
steps: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C) and grease a baking pan.
In a large bowl, cream together the softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, alternating with milk.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 30-35 minutes until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow to cool completely before slicing or frosting.

recipes.title: Rice Pudding (Kheer)
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Rice Pudding (Kheer), carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 2 cups Basmati rice, washed and soaked
steps: Marinate the mixed vegetables with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, and spices for 1 hour.
In a large pot, heat ghee and fry the whole spices and sliced onions until golden brown.
Add the marinated mixture and cook until the oil begins to separate.
In a separate pot, boil water with salt and whole spices, then parboil the soaked basmati rice (about 70% cooked).
Layer the parboiled rice over the cooked mixture. Sprinkle mint leaves and saffron milk.
Cover tightly and cook on low heat (dum) for 20-25 minutes. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Custard
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Custard, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 1/4 cup Cornstarch or Custard powder (if making custard)
1 tsp Vanilla extract or Cardamom powder
steps: In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, bring the milk to a gentle boil.
Add your base ingredient (like soaked rice or pre-mixed custard powder slurry).
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, stirring continuously to prevent sticking.
Once the mixture thickens to the desired consistency, stir in the sugar and flavor extracts.
Continue to cook for another 5 minutes until the sugar is fully dissolved.
Remove from heat, garnish with chopped nuts, and chill in the refrigerator before serving.

Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, alternating with milk.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 30-35 minutes until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow to cool completely before slicing or frosting.

recipes.title: Waffles
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Waffles, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
steps: Prepare all ingredients by washing, peeling, and chopping as necessary.
Heat oil or butter in a pan over medium heat. Sauté the onions and garlic until fragrant.
Add the main ingredient and cook until browned on all sides.
Stir in the spices and season generously with salt and pepper.
Add a splash of water or broth, cover, and simmer until fully cooked.
Plate beautifully, garnish with fresh herbs, and serve hot.

recipes.title: Fruit Salad with Cream
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Fruit Salad with Cream, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: Salt and freshly cracked black pepper
steps: Wash and thoroughly dry all the salad greens and vegetables.
In a large serving bowl, combine the greens, tomatoes, cucumber, and red onion.
In a small jar, combine the olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Shake vigorously to emulsify the dressing.
Pour the dressing over the salad just before serving.
Toss gently to ensure all ingredients are coated evenly.

recipes.title: Fruit Custard
recipes.description: A delicious preparation of Fruit Custard, carefully crafted for the perfect meal.
ingredients: 1/4 cup Cornstarch or Custard powder (if making custard)
1 tsp Vanilla extract or Cardamom powder
steps: In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, bring the milk to a gentle boil.
Add your base ingredient (like soaked rice or pre-mixed custard powder slurry).
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, stirring continuously to prevent sticking.
Once the mixture thickens to the desired consistency, stir in the sugar and flavor extracts.
Continue to cook for another 5 minutes until the sugar is fully dissolved.
Remove from heat, garnish with chopped nuts, and chill in the refrigerator before serving.
